ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Hindustan Unilever Limited (HUL) has issued a standard regulatory notice announcing a Board Meeting on July 28, 2026, to consider and approve its unaudited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. These results, accompanied by a Limited Review Report, will be released to the exchanges post-meeting, followed by an analyst/investor presentation. This document is purely procedural; the material impact lies in the impending financial disclosure, and there are no immediate financial impacts or red flags identified within this notice.
